title: Uniface Glyphs by Subject
text: Uniface Glyphs by Subject Refer to the tables that group Uniface glyphs by subject or theme. These tables do not include all the glyphs delivered with Uniface. In each table, the glyphs are grouped by image. Glyphs: Application Model Glyphs: Components Glyphs: Global Objects Glyphs: Text Editing Glyphs: File Actions Glyphs: Uniface Logos Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
